heading: crypto
body:
Atlas Functions support the [crypto](https://nodejs.org/api/crypto.html) module with
the following **exceptions**:

- Atlas Functions do **not** support [crypto.createDiffieHellman()](https://nodejs.org/api/crypto.html#crypto_crypto_creatediffiehellman_prime_primeencoding_generator_generatorencoding)

- Atlas Functions do **not** support [crypto.createDiffieHellmanGroup()](https://nodejs.org/api/crypto.html#crypto_crypto_creatediffiehellmangroup_name)

- Atlas Functions do **not** support [crypto.createECDH()](https://nodejs.org/api/crypto.html#crypto_crypto_createecdh_curvename)
